summary: Fixed path traversal vulnerability in detectFabricatedRefs by resolving paths and asserting they stay within repoRoot. Tightened file:line regex to require a known extension, fixed Jaccard similarity to return 0 for empty sets, integrated runCompoundGate into synthesize.mjs (injects synthetic critical on FAIL, adds compoundGate field to output), and added 7 fixture-based integration tests covering thin/fabricated eval.md → FAIL and detailed eval.md → PASS scenarios.
